violations.text: The floors beneath market shelves and in the basement storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2026

Juice was observed held at 44-48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Juice was relocated to basement milk cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of all of the refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The milk chest freezer has an accumulation of frost, ice, and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The receptacle in the unisex toilet rooms are lacking covers. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The floors throughout the facility, stairs to the basement, and basement floor have an accumulation of soil residue, trash, and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The walls along the stairs to the basement are in poor repair, with numerous smaller holes and one large one on the side of a step near the bottom. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
